verses.sanskrit: निवेश्य सेनां तु विभु: पद्भ्यां पादवतां वर:।अभिगन्तुं स काकुत्स्थमियेष गुरुवर्त्तकम् ॥ २.९८.१॥
verses.text:
After encamping the army, the mighty Bharata the excellent among men, sought to
approach on foot, Rama who was complying with the words of his father.

verses.sanskrit: निविष्टमात्रे सैन्ये तु यथोद्देशं विनीतवत्।भरतो भ्रातरं वाक्यं शत्रुघ्नमिदमब्रवीत् ॥ २.९८.२॥
verses.text:
Soon after encamping the army in a well-behaved manner per the guidelines, Bharata
spoke the following words to Shatrughna:

verses.sanskrit: क्षिप्रं वनमिदं सौम्य नरसङ्घै: समन्तत:।लुब्धैश्च सहितैरेभिस्त्वमन्वेषितुमर्हसि ॥ २.९८.३॥
verses.text:
"O, gentle brother! You, along with a troop of men and trackers, ought to search on
all sides of this forest."

verses.sanskrit: गुहो ज्ञातिसहस्रेण शरचापासिधारिणा।समन्वेषतु काकुत्स्थावस्मिन् परिवृत: स्वयम् ॥ २.९८.४॥
verses.text:
"Let Guha search for Rama and Lakshmana in this forest, himself accompanied by a
multitude of his kinsmen, duly wielding their bows, arrows and swords."

verses.sanskrit: अमात्यै: सह पौरैश्च गुरुभिश्च द्विजातिभि:।वनं सर्वं चरिष्यामि पद्भ्यां परिवृत: स्वयम् ॥ २.९८.५॥
verses.text:
"I too, surrounded by the ministers, citizens, priests and Brahmanas; shall
personally go round the entire forest on foot.

verses.sanskrit: यावन्न रामं द्रक्ष्यामि लक्ष्मणं वा महाबलम्।वैदेहीं वा महाभागां न मे शान्तिर्भविष्यति ॥ २.९८.६॥
verses.text:
"Peace will not be with me until I do not see Rama or the very mighty Lakshmana or
the illustrious Seetha."

verses.sanskrit: यावन्न चन्द्रसङ्काशं द्रक्ष्यामि शुभमाननम्।भ्रातु: पद्मपलाशाक्षं न मे शान्तिर्भविष्यति ॥ २.९८.७॥
verses.text:
"Peace will not be with me until I do not see the auspicious face of my elder
brother, resembling the moon and having eyes bearing resemblance to lotus-leaves.

verses.sanskrit: यावन्न चरणौ भ्रातु: पार्थिवव्यञ्जनान्वितौ।शिरसा धारयिष्यामि न मे शान्तिर्भविष्यति ॥ २.९८.८॥
verses.text:
"Peace will nt be with me until I do not hold firmly on my head, the soles of my
elder brother, bearing royal insignia.

verses.sanskrit: यावन्न राज्ये राज्यार्ह: पितृपैतामहे स्थित:।अभिषेकजलक्लिन्नो न मे शान्तिर्भविष्ऺयति ॥ २.९८.९॥
verses.text:
"Peace will not come to me until my elder brother, who is eligible for the crown, is
not installed in the kingdom of Ayodhya, which was derived from our father and grand father and
consecrated by sprinkling water on his head (as a symbol of crowing the kingdom)."

verses.sanskrit: सिद्धार्थ: खलु सौमित्रिर्यश्चन्द्रविमलोपमम्।मुखं पश्यति रामस्य राजीवाक्षं महाद्युति ॥ २.९८.१०॥
verses.text:
"Lakshmana, who is seeing regularly the face of Rama having a great luminance
resembling the bright moon and having lotus eyes, is indeed an accomplished man."

verses.sanskrit: कृतकत्या महाभागा वैदेही जनकात्मजा।भर्तारं सागरान्ताया: पृथिव्या याऽनुगच्छति ॥ २.९८.११॥
verses.text:
"Seetha, the illustrious daughter of Janaka, who is following the steps of Rama the
Lord of the earth extending to the sea, has fulfilled her object."

verses.sanskrit: सुभगश्चित्रकूटोऽसौ गिरिराजोपमो गिरि:।यस्मिन् वसति काकुत्स्थ: कुबेर इव नन्दने ॥ २.९८.१२॥
verses.text:
"That enchanting mountain of Chitrakuta resembles the King of Mountains on which
Rama is residing, as Kubera the Lord of riches is living in the garden of Nandana."

verses.sanskrit: कृतकार्यमिदं दुर्गं वनं व्यालनिषेवितम्।यदध्यास्ते महातेजा राम: शस्त्रभृतां वर: ॥ २.९८.१३॥
verses.text:
"Blessed is this dense forest, inhabited by wild animals, where Rama, the great
warrior and the excellent man among the wielders of weapons, dwells."

verses.sanskrit: एवमुक्त्वा महातेजा भरत: पुरुषर्षभ:।पद्भ्यामेव महाबाहु: प्रविवेश महद्वनम् ॥ २.९८.१४॥
स तानि द्रुमजालानि जातानि गिरिसानुषु।पुष्पिताग्राणि मध्येन जगाम वदतां वर: ॥ २.९८.१५॥
तं दृष्ट्वा भरत: श्रीमान् मुमोह सहबान्धव:।अत्र राम इति ज्ञात्वा गत: पारमिवाम्भस: ॥ २.९८.१७॥
स चित्रकूटे तु गिरौ निशम्य रामाश्रमं पुण्यजनोपपन्नम्।गुहेन सार्द्धं त्वरितो जगाम पुनर्निवेश्यैव चमूं महात्मा ॥ २.९८.१८ ॥
